mapper.select: SELECT E.USER_ID AS USER_ID, E.USER_NO AS USER_NO, E.NAME AS NAME, E.EMAIL AS EMAIL, E.ADDRESS_MAIN AS ADDRESS_MAIN, E.ADDRESS_SUB AS ADDRESS_SUB, E.ACTIVE_YN AS ACTIVE_YN, E.CREATED_AT AS CREATED_AT FROM JPAS_TB_USER E WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY E.USER_NO

SELECT E.USER_ID AS USER_ID, E.USER_NO AS USER_NO, E.NAME AS NAME, E.EMAIL AS EMAIL, E.ADDRESS_MAIN AS ADDRESS_MAIN, E.ADDRESS_SUB AS ADDRESS_SUB, E.ACTIVE_YN AS ACTIVE_YN, E.CREATED_AT AS CREATED_AT FROM JPAS_TB_USER E WHERE 1=1 AND E.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY E.USER_NO
